channel.title: Advances in Geometry
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Advances in Geometry

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Mareike Dressler, Salma Kuhlmann, Moritz Schick DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/advgeom-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: New rigidity results for critical metrics of some quadratic curvature functionals
item.description: Article by Mareike Dressler, Salma Kuhlmann, Moritz Schick DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/advgeom-2024-0032

item.title: Extremizers of the Alexandrov–Fenchel inequality within a new class of convex bodies
item.description: Article by Mareike Dressler, Salma Kuhlmann, Moritz Schick DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/advgeom-2024-0030

item.title: Perturbation theory of asymptotic operators of contact instantons and pseudoholomorphic curves on symplectization
item.description: Article by Mareike Dressler, Salma Kuhlmann, Moritz Schick DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/advgeom-2024-0033

item.title: Cylinders in smooth del Pezzo surfaces of degree 2
item.description: Article by Mareike Dressler, Salma Kuhlmann, Moritz Schick DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/advgeom-2024-0034

item.title: The total absolute curvature of closed curves with singularities
item.description: Article by Mareike Dressler, Salma Kuhlmann, Moritz Schick DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/advgeom-2024-0024

item.title: On some relations between the perimeter, the area and the visual angle of a convex set
item.description: Article by Mareike Dressler, Salma Kuhlmann, Moritz Schick DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/advgeom-2024-0036

item.title: Fundamental polyhedra of projective elementary groups
item.description: Article by Mareike Dressler, Salma Kuhlmann, Moritz Schick DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/advgeom-2024-0035

item.title: Study of the cone of sums of squares plus sums of nonnegative circuit forms
item.description: Article by Mareike Dressler, Salma Kuhlmann, Moritz Schick DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/advgeom-2024-0031
